List all merchants. Optionally include transaction counts.

schema.title: Response List Merchants Api Merchants  Get

get.description: Test matching a raw merchant name against known merchants.

post.description: Absorb another merchant's patterns into this one, then delete the source.

get.description: Get all transactions matching a merchant's name and patterns.

post.description:
Retroactively resolve merchant names for all existing transactions.

For each transaction whose description hasn't been manually edited,
match raw_description against known merchants. If matched, update
description to the canonical merchant name and learn the pattern.
